seo_title: Leo February 2026 Horoscope: Key Dates, Love, Career & Crystal of the Month
h1: Leo February 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month
meta_description: Leo February 2026 horoscope: the Snow Moon full moon in your sign, Saturn in Aries (your 9th), and the Aquarius solar eclipse in your 7th. Key dates, love, career, and Clear Quartz as crystal of the month.
key_dates_overview: Feb 1 — Full Moon in Leo (1st house, your sign)
Feb 17 — New Moon solar eclipse in Aquarius (7th house)
Feb 26 — Mercury retrograde begins in Pisces (8th house)
affirmation: I shine brightest when my partnerships match my truth.
content:
This Month's Energy

Leo, February 2026 opens with a full moon in your own sign on Feb 1 — the Snow Moon — making the first week a personal culmination moment. Then Saturn enters Aries on Feb 13-14 and opens a 2.5-year cycle in your 9th house of belief, higher study, and long horizons. The Aquarius solar eclipse on Feb 17 lands in your 7th house of partnership: a relationship storyline is being rewritten. The combined theme: self-recognition meets relationship revision. The full moon asks who am I now; the eclipse asks who belongs beside me.

Key Dates

| Date | Transit | Meaning for Leo | Do / Avoid | |------|---------|------------------|------------| | Feb 1 | Full Moon in Leo (Snow Moon) | Personal culmination in your 1st house — a six-month arc peaks | Do: claim a new identity statement / Avoid: performing for validation | | Feb 13-14 | Saturn enters Aries | A 2.5-year cycle of belief and study begins in your 9th house | Do: commit to one teaching / Avoid: enrolling in five courses | | Feb 17 | New Moon solar eclipse in Aquarius 28°04' | Eclipse in your 7th house rewrites a partnership | Do: name what you need from a partner / Avoid: signing marriage or business contracts this week | | Feb 17-20 | Saturn-Neptune conjunction at Aries 0° | A belief or long journey fuses structure with dream | Do: plan a meaningful trip / Avoid: escaping reality through travel | | Feb 26 | Mercury retrograde begins in Pisces | Your 8th house of intimacy and shared resources slows | Do: revisit a financial agreement / Avoid: new joint accounts | | Feb 28 | Six-planet alignment | Stabilizes the partnership revision | Do: write the qualities of your ideal partner / Avoid: comparing your relationship to others' |

Career & Money

Saturn in your 9th house from Feb 13 begins a 2.5-year arc where your work tilts toward teaching, publishing, international reach, and thought leadership — Leo flavors of authority that scale. The Feb 1 full moon in your sign already hands you a moment of recognition: a launch, a leadership role, or a personal rebrand peaks. The 7th-house eclipse on Feb 17 can shift a business partnership: a collaborator may exit, enter, or renegotiate. Money is steady; Mercury retrograde in your 8th from Feb 26 asks for review of shared finances, debts, or investments. For stones traditionally associated with prosperity and self-expression, see /crystals-for-wealth/. Leo, with Saturn entering your 9th house on Feb 13, your career tilts toward teaching, publishing, international work, or thought leadership for the next 2.5 years. This is the Leo-flavored authority that scales — your voice reaching a wider audience through courses, books, broadcasts, or long-form work. The Feb 1 full moon in your sign already hands you a recognition moment: a launch, a leadership role, a personal rebrand peaks. Move into it. Then the Feb 17 eclipse in your 7th house can shift a business partnership — a collaborator may enter, exit, or renegotiate. Mercury Rx from Feb 26 in your 8th house brings a shared-resources review (a partner's income, an investment, a debt). Money is steady rather than dramatic in February; the bigger shift is in direction and who you build with.

Love & Relationships

This is the love-story month of your year. The Feb 17 solar eclipse in your 7th house of partnership is the most relationship-defining transit of 2026 for Leo. Single? An introduction is possible eclipse week — but Saturn's involvement says: choose someone whose worldview matches yours, not just someone whose energy excites you. Partnered? The eclipse either deepens commitment or surfaces the gap between you. The Feb 1 Leo full moon in your sign is a confidence peak — date night matters then. Venus in Capricorn (your 6th house) for most of the month brings a practical, service-oriented tone to love. For stones traditionally connected with love, see /crystals-for-love/ and /crystals-for-anxiety/. This is the love-story month of your year — possibly your decade. The Feb 17 solar eclipse in your 7th house is the most partnership-defining transit of 2026 for Leo. Saturn entering your 9th simultaneously means: your partner (current or future) needs to match your worldview, not just your aesthetic. Single? An introduction is possible eclipse week, but Saturn's involvement says: this one wants substance, not just performance. Partnered? The relationship either deepens into real commitment or surfaces the gap. The Feb 1 Leo full moon in your sign is a confidence peak — schedule a meaningful date night, share something vulnerable, and let your radiance lead. Venus in Capricorn (your 6th house) for most of February brings a practical, service-oriented tone to love — small acts of daily care matter more than grand gestures this month.

Health & Wellness

A full moon in your sign on Feb 1 makes early February energetically intense — expect heightened emotion, vivid dreams, or a physical reset. The lifestyle cue for February is heart-centered practices: anything that opens the chest (gentle backbends, swimming, time with beloved animals) supports your Leo-ruled physiology. Saturn in your 9th from Feb 13 makes long walks, study, and travel real medicine for you this year. From Feb 26, Mercury retrograde in your 8th house suggests slower intimacy and gentler sleep routines. Clear Quartz is traditionally used as a clarity symbol during intention-setting; it is not medical advice.

Crystal of the Month

Clear Quartz — the master amplifier — is Leo's crystal for February 2026. Why this crystal fits Leo this month. The Sun rules your chart, and February 2026 asks you to refine what you amplify. A full moon in your sign plus a 7th-house partnership eclipse plus Saturn in your 9th means: your radiance is being sharpened, not dimmed. Clear Quartz is traditionally associated with clarity, intention amplification, and neutral balance — the quality your fire needs when a relationship is being rewritten. You don't need more radiance; you need a clear lens. How to use it during February. Hold it during the Feb 1 full moon while you speak aloud your new identity statement. Keep it on your desk during the Feb 17 eclipse while you write what you need from partnership. Pair it with Sunstone (your sign's traditional ally) on Feb 28. Best date to use it. February 1, the Leo full moon — pair it with a mirror practice: look yourself in the eye and name one truth. Read more. Full Clear Quartz meaning guide and the Leo crystals collection. Leo benefits from working with Clear Quartz as an amplifier alongside your sign's traditional stones (Sunstone, Citrine, Tiger's Eye). On Feb 1 (your full moon), place Clear Quartz between a Sunstone and a Citrine to form a solar triangle — a traditional Leo arrangement for confidence and radiance. Avoid heavily irradiated or treated Clear Quartz; the natural cool clarity of the stone is the point. As a fire sign ruled by the Sun, you may find Clear Quartz most alive in direct sunlight — five minutes of solar charging each morning through February matches your solar nature. On Feb 17 (the 7th-house eclipse), hold the stone while you write the qualities of your ideal partner. Saturn in your 9th means: include worldview, not just chemistry, on the list.

Monthly Crystal Ritual

The Full-Moon-in-Leo Mirror Ritual — February 1 1. Cleanse. Place your Clear Quartz in direct moonlight on the night of Jan 31 (eve of the full moon). 2. Intention. A full moon in your sign is a personal culmination. Stand before a mirror, Clear Quartz in your receiving hand, and speak one sentence: "This is who I am now." Saturn's arrival in your 9th house says: choose a sentence you can study, teach, and travel with for years. 3. Action. Carry the stone with you from Feb 1 to Feb 17 (eclipse). Each evening, hold it and ask: did I act in alignment with my statement today? 4. Reflection. On Feb 17, set the stone beside a written list of what you need from partnership. Let the eclipse reorganize your relationships around your truth.

Shop

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Leo crystal guide for stones connected with confidence, self-expression, love, and radiant protection — curated for your fire-sign nature and the eclipse season ahead.

FAQ

Is February 2026 a good month for Leo? It opens powerfully (full moon in your sign Feb 1) and closes transformationally (7th-house eclipse Feb 17). The middle is study + structure (Saturn into your 9th). Bold, defining month. How will Saturn entering Aries affect Leo? It enters your 9th house of belief, study, and long-distance horizons for 2.5 years. Your work tilts toward teaching, publishing, and travel. Commit to one path. How will the February 17 solar eclipse affect Leo? It activates your 7th house of partnership — the most relationship-defining transit of your year. A bond deepens or releases. Don't finalize marriage or business contracts eclipse week. What is the best crystal for Leo in February 2026? Clear Quartz, for clarity during a self-recognition + relationship-revision month. Alternatives: Sunstone for solar radiance, Citrine for confidence. Full collection: Leo crystals. Will the Leo full moon on February 1 affect me strongly? Yes — the Sun rules your chart, so a full moon in your sign hits you harder than most. Expect vivid dreams, emotional peaks, and a personal culmination moment.
